nasb.text: Now may the Lord of peace Himself continually grant you peace in every circumstance. The Lord be with you all!

esv.text: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in every way. The Lord be with you all.

cnv.text: 願賜平安的主親自隨時隨地賜平安給你們。願主與你們眾人同在。

ccb.text: 愿平安之主随时随地亲自赐你们平安！愿主与你们同在！

csbs.text: 愿赐平安的主，常常以各种方法亲自赐给你们平安！愿主与你们大家同在！
